title: Keto Chicken Skewers with Italian Seasoning
description: A flavorful and healthy dish made with marinated chicken breast, served with a side of fresh vegetables. Perfect for a keto diet.
instructions: In a small bowl, mix together Italian seasoning, salt, and pepper.
Thread chicken, spring onions, and robust bell peppers onto skewers.
Brush both sides of the chicken and vegetables with olive oil.
Sprinkle the Italian seasoning mixture evenly over both sides of the chicken and vegetables.
Grill the skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, or until the chicken is cooked through and reaches an internal temperature of 165°F (74°C).
